title: calanthe landyae
intro: Calanthe landyae, also known as the Landy's orchid or the Yellow calanthe, is a species of orchid that is native to tropical Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calanthe landyae include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems, while also being used as an antiseptic to treat wounds. In herbal preparations, Calanthe landyae can be made into a tea, tincture, or poultice, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
